creator: miwi@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi, 

I think this port need a bit rework, 

your rc.d script handling is wrong, please reread the FreeBSD Porter's 
Handbook, 
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/rc-scripts.html 

You should also check this port with portlint -AC Please look at the 
Porters Handbook for more instructions.  Please followup this pr with a 
new patch. 

Thanks.
